title: controller
description: Controller (control IC) component payload. ONE agnostic schema for every power-electronics control IC: PWM / multiphase / LLC-resonant / PFC / dual / phase-shift / sync-rectifier controllers, isolated & non-isolated gate drivers, digital/PMBus controllers, secondary-side & opto feedback, shunt regulators, voltage references, current-sense & isolated amplifiers, and hot-swap / eFuse controllers. function.category is the required discriminator; `electrical` is partitioned into optional CLOSED capability sub-objects that appear ONLY for the categories that use them (a TL431 carries shuntReference, never slopeCompensation) — this satisfies 'fewest fields / no redundancy / cover all cases' without a per-category oneOf explosion. The root is the unwrapped payload that PEAS references for its `controller` branch and that TAS validates each controllers.ndjson record against. An empty `{}` is a valid pre-librarian seed; a resolved part carries manufacturerInfo (which itself carries datasheetInfo). Field list derived from a datasheet survey of TI / Analog Devices / onsemi / Infineon / ST / Renesas / Power Integrations parts.

behavioral.title: controllerBehavioral
behavioral.description: Simulator-agnostic IDEAL behavioural model of the controller's CONTROL LAW, for circuit simulation — distinct from the datasheet `electrical` capability sub-objects (which describe a resolved real part). Present on an otherwise part-less document to describe an ideal control block that a simulator backend realises (e.g. as a network of comparators). The shape is keyed by controlScheme; only synchronousRectifier is defined so far (additive as more laws are modelled).

controlScheme.description: Which ideal control law this block realises.

sensing.description: What the controller senses to commutate the rectifier. current = the secondary/tank current sign through a sense element (the robust choice for resonant converters); drainSource = each SR switch's Vds (per-switch body-diode emulation).

topology.description: Rectifier bridge topology the controller drives.

hysteresis.description: Comparator hysteresis half-width on the sensed signal, in V. 0 (or absent) is an ideal zero-hysteresis commutation.

threshold.description: Commutation threshold on the sensed signal, in V.

manufacturerInfo.description: Identity of the resolved real part plus its parametric catalog block (datasheetInfo). Mirrors the CAS / CONAS nesting (datasheetInfo lives under manufacturerInfo).

datasheetInfo.description: All parametric information extracted from the controller datasheet. `function` is required (carries the category discriminator); every other block is independently optional.

pins.description: Slim canonical pin map for stencil wiring. The (number, name, function) triple is canonical; per-pin absolute-max ratings are intentionally NOT modelled here.

part.description: Part identification. Extends the shared datasheetInfoPartBase (partNumber / series / case / description) with the controller-specific deviceType + technology tags.

deviceType.description: Coarse device class as the source catalog tagged it (almost always 'controller'). The authoritative functional class is function.category.

technology.description: Manufacturer process / family tag as published (e.g. 'BiCMOS', 'pwm', 'InnoSwitch3'). Free text; not a selection key.

function.description: What the controller is and does. Mirrors the 'Description / Features' page. category is the required selection discriminator.

intendedTopologies.description: Topology families this controller is designed for. Empty/absent for non-converter parts (references, current-sense amps).

channelCount.description: Number of independent regulation channels / control loops.

maxPhaseCount.description: Maximum number of interleaved power phases the part can drive on one rail (reconfigurable VR controllers, e.g. 6+2). Invariant: maxPhaseCount >= channelCount.

phaseShedding.description: True if the controller drops/adds phases with load (only meaningful when maxPhaseCount > 1).

frequencyJitterSupported.description: True if the controller implements frequency dithering for conducted-EMI reduction.

electrical.description: Operating electrical characteristics. Common scalars at the top; optional CLOSED capability sub-objects below, each populated ONLY for the categories that use it.

supplyVoltage.description: Operating VCC / VDD range, in volts.

quiescentCurrent.description: Typical operating supply current, in amperes.

startupCurrent.description: Supply current before UVLO release (start-up draw on VCC), in amperes.

switchingFrequencyMin.description: Lowest programmable / regulated switching frequency, in Hz. For a fixed-frequency part set min == max. For LLC this is the bottom of the regulation band.

switchingFrequencyMax.description: Highest programmable / regulated switching frequency, in Hz. For LLC this is the band top / soft-start sweep start frequency.

maxDutyCycleClampType.description: How the maximum duty cycle is bounded. 'toggleFlipFlop' = structural 50% ceiling from a steering flip-flop (UC1845); 'programmable' = a settable DMAX; 'none' = no internal clamp (UC3842 ~100%). The numeric ceiling itself is maxDutyCycle.

referenceVoltage.description: Internal feedback / bandgap reference seen at the error-amp input, in volts.

referenceTolerance.description: Initial accuracy of the reference, as a fraction (0.01 = 1%).

softStartTime.description: Internal / programmed soft-start ramp duration, in seconds.

leadingEdgeBlanking.description: Leading-edge blanking applied to the current-sense input, in seconds.

deadTime.description: Dead time between complementary outputs, in seconds. Use for single-edge parts only; multi-edge parts (PSFB) use gateDrive.deadTimes[].

highVoltageStartup.description: On-die high-voltage start-up cell that charges VCC from the bulk rail.

dynamicResponseEnhancer.description: True if the part has a transient-boost / dynamic-response-enhancement path (DRE / EDR).

uvlo.description: Under-voltage-lockout domains. An array because isolated drivers and integrated-half-bridge parts have more than one (input-logic / driver-output / floating high-side), each on its own rail.

currentMode.description: Current-mode (peak / average) modulator characteristics. The CS-comparator clamp is the single non-derivable headline parameter for current-mode parts.

maxThresholdVoltage.description: Maximum current-sense comparator threshold (peak CS clamp), in volts (UC384x 1.0 V, NCP1250 0.8 V, UCC28950 2.0 V).

transconductance.description: Forward transconductance gm, in siemens (transconductance amplifiers).

openLoopGain.description: DC open-loop gain, in dB (voltage amplifiers).

outputSourceCurrent.description: Peak source current of the amplifier output, in amperes.

outputSinkCurrent.description: Peak sink current of the amplifier output, in amperes.

secondInstance.description: True when the part has a second (current-loop) amplifier, e.g. a PFC average-current-mode gm-i amp distinct from the voltage gm-v amp (UCC28180).

gateDrive.description: Gate-driver output stage (parts with an on-die driver: drivers and switchers with integrated outputs).

sinkCurrentPeak.description: Peak sink (pull-down) current, in amperes. Kept separate from source because they are usually asymmetric.

driveVoltage.description: Positive output-side drive-rail range, in volts.

negativeBiasMin.description: Most-negative turn-off bias the output rail supports (bipolar SiC/IGBT drivers), in volts (negative). Omit for unipolar drivers.

propagationDelayMatching.description: Channel-to-channel propagation-delay matching, in seconds (sizes the minimum usable dead time).

minPulseWidth.description: Minimum input pulse the driver will pass, in seconds.

interlock.description: True if outputs are interlocked against shoot-through (half-bridge drivers).

activeMillerClamp.description: True if the driver has an active Miller clamp for the off state.

deadTimes.description: Named dead-time / delay edges for multi-edge controllers (PSFB UCC28950 DELAB/DELCD/DELEF). Supersedes the scalar electrical.deadTime.

adaptiveDeadTime.description: True if dead time is adapted from sensed dV/dt (ZVS tracking).

gateCurrentProgrammable.description: True if the gate-drive strength (IDRIVE) is programmable in steps (smart gate drivers, DRV835x).

slewRateProgrammable.description: True if output slew rate is adjustable (GaN smart drivers, RDRV).

uvlo.description: Under-voltage-lockout operating boundary. Carried here (not as a protections[] row) so the start/stop thresholds and the rail they apply to are first-class.

side.description: Which rail the UVLO monitors. 'input' = VCC/VCCI (controller/primary-logic side); 'output' = driver-output supply; 'floating' = bootstrapped high-side rail.

selectableOptions.description: Pin-/option-selectable UVLO threshold set, in volts (e.g. [8, 12] for a VDD-OFF-selectable driver).

isolationRating.description: Galvanic-isolation barrier rating (isolated gate drivers, isolated amplifiers, digital isolators, opto feedback). Absent on non-isolated parts.

workingVoltage.description: Maximum repetitive working isolation voltage (VIORM, peak), in volts.

cmti.description: Common-mode transient immunity, in volts per second (UCC21520 125e9 = 125 V/ns).

creepage.description: External creepage across the package, in metres.

clearance.description: External clearance across the package, in metres.

senseAmplifier.description: Current-sense / isolated amplifier (and isolated delta-sigma modulator) characteristics. Used by currentSenseAmplifier and isolatedAmplifier categories; outputFormat distinguishes analog amps from bitstream isolated ADCs (AMC1306).

gainErrorMax.description: Maximum gain error, as a fraction.

inputOffsetVoltage.description: Maximum input offset voltage, in volts.

commonModeRange.description: Input common-mode voltage range, in volts (INA240 -4..80 V).

inputVoltageRange.description: Full-scale differential input range, in volts (AMC1301 +/-0.25 V).

bidirectional.description: True if it senses both current directions.

outputFormat.description: Output representation. Bitstream formats mark isolated delta-sigma modulators (AMC1306) versus analog isolated amps.

shuntReference.description: Adjustable shunt regulator (TL431-class) characteristics. The cathode-current window and dynamic impedance are the defining specs; the device is usually the secondary-side loop error amplifier.

minCathodeCurrent.description: Minimum cathode current for regulation, in amperes (TL431 ~250 uA).

dynamicImpedance.description: Cathode dynamic impedance, in ohms (TL431 ~0.2 ohm).

adjustableRange.description: Programmable output (cathode) voltage range, in volts.

voltageReference.description: Series / shunt voltage-reference precision specs (voltageReference category). referenceVoltage / referenceTolerance live in the common electrical block; this block carries the second-order precision specs.

outputNoise.description: Output noise (0.1-10 Hz), in volts peak-to-peak.

longTermDrift.description: Long-term drift, in ppm per 1000 hours.

lineRegulation.description: Line regulation, in volts per volt.

loadRegulation.description: Load regulation, in volts per ampere.

outputCurrent.description: Rated output current for series references, in amperes.

dropoutVoltage.description: Headroom / dropout for series references, in volts.

hotSwap.description: Hot-swap / eFuse front-end characteristics (hotSwapController, eFuse). Carries the fast circuit-breaker, the slow SOA power limit, and the fault-response variant axis that a protections[] OCP row cannot express together.

currentLimit.description: Active current-limit set point, in amperes.

circuitBreakerThreshold.description: Fast circuit-breaker sense-voltage threshold, in volts.

powerLimit.description: SOA power-limit set point, in watts (LM5066).

inrushSlewRate.description: Programmed output dV/dt during inrush, in volts per second.

reverseBlocking.description: True if reverse-current blocking is supported.

currentMonitorGain.description: Analog current-monitor (IMON) transfer gain, in volts per ampere.

vdsOcpThreshold.description: External-FET VDS-sense overcurrent threshold, in volts (smart-driver / hot-swap FET protection).

syncRectifier.description: Synchronous-rectifier controller VDS-sensing characteristics (syncRectifierController). The negative turn-on / near-zero turn-off VDS thresholds are the defining specs.

turnOnThreshold.description: VDS turn-on threshold, in volts (negative, ~ -150 mV class).

turnOffThreshold.description: VDS turn-off threshold, in volts (near 0, slightly negative).

proportionalGateDrive.description: True if the SR gate drive is proportional to conduction.

ccmCycleLimit.description: True if a CCM cycle-limit / pre-turn-off prevents shoot-through in continuous conduction.

entryThreshold.description: Feedback voltage at which burst mode is entered, in volts.

exitThreshold.description: Feedback voltage at which burst mode is exited, in volts.

programmable.description: True if the burst threshold is externally programmable.

standbyPower.description: Typical no-load / standby input power, in watts.

brownOut.description: Bulk-/line-voltage brown-in / brown-out monitor (distinct from VCC UVLO; thresholds are in bulk-node volts).

threshold.description: Brown-out (falling) threshold at the monitored node, in volts.

pfc.description: PFC control-strategy parameters (pfcController). The multiplier / line-feedforward path defines the current reference for behavioural PFC simulation.

multiplierInput.description: True if the part uses an analog multiplier (Vline x Vea) to shape the current reference.

lineFeedforward.description: True if input-voltage feedforward is implemented.

frequencyFoldbackFloor.description: Current-controlled frequency-foldback (CCFF) clamp floor, in Hz.

valleySwitching.description: True if quasi-resonant valley turn-on is used (CrM/transition PFC).

loadLine.description: Output load-line / droop characteristics (multiphase VR controllers).

programmable.description: True if the load-line slope is configurable.

dcrSenseSupported.description: True if inductor-DCR current sense is supported.

synchronization.description: Inter-chip clock synchronization (distinct from intra-chip interleaving). Lets a stencil set the relative phase of paralleled converters.

frequencyMultiplier.description: Sync-pulse frequency relative to switching frequency (e.g. 2 for a 2x sync clock).

phaseShift.description: Phase shift applied when synced, in degrees.

integratedPowerStage.description: Pointer to the integrated power FET(s) for GaN/Si power-stage ICs (driver + FET). CTAS owns only the driver/protection half; the FET physics (RDS(on), VDS, Coss, Qg, avalanche) live in SAS and are referenced, never duplicated.

semiconductorRef.description: Identifier of the SAS semiconductor record describing the integrated FET(s).

switchCount.description: Number of integrated power switches (1 for a single GaN FET, 2 for a half-bridge stage).

protection.description: One on-die protection event with its threshold, recovery mode and (optionally) response time and the rail it monitors.

threshold.description: Trip threshold in native units of the monitored quantity (V for voltage-class, A for current-class, degC for temperature, fraction for duty-class).

hysteresis.description: Hysteresis, in the same units as threshold.

restartDelay.description: Auto-restart / hiccup delay before re-engagement, in seconds.

responseTime.description: Trip-to-action response time, in seconds (fast OCP / desat / eFuse, < 100 ns class).

rail.description: Which rail/node the event monitors (disambiguates OVP/UVP without doubling the kind enum).

pin.description: One pin of the controller. The (number, name, function) triple is canonical and unique within a part.

digitalInterface.description: Digital communication + configuration interface (digital / PMBus / programmable parts). A part with no digital interface omits this object.

strapPinCount.description: Number of strap pins used to set the address.

configurableViaNvm.description: True if device behaviour (setpoints, loop, sequencing) is configured by writing non-volatile memory.

telemetry.description: Telemetry channels reported over the interface (PMBus READ_* map 1:1).

vidDac.description: Voltage-identification DAC (VR/IMVP digital controllers). Replaces a fixed referenceVoltage for VID-controlled parts.

stepVoltageOptions.description: Selectable VID step sizes, in volts.

digitalControl.description: Programmable digital control-loop resources (digital controllers, UCD3138 / XDPP1100 / ADP1055).

processorCore.description: On-die processor core, if any (e.g. 'ARM Cortex-M0', 'proprietary').

thermal.description: Thermal data. Extends the shared datasheetInfoThermal (operatingTemperature) with the junction-temperature limit and the package thermal resistances a controller datasheet publishes.

mechanical.description: Mechanical package data. Extends the shared datasheetInfoMechanical (length/width/height/weight) with the IC package code and assembly type. pinCount is intentionally NOT stored (derive from pins[]).

compliance.description: Qualification and regulatory compliance. Replaces the former (dangling) business $ref. complianceTargets reuse the PEAS shared complianceTarget primitive.
